CustomField.formula: IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "A.Pub-Admin. Pública" ), " A.Pub-Admin. Pública",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Banca-Banca" ), "Banca-Banca",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Energía" ), "Energía",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Environment" ), "Energía",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Industria-Industria" ), "Industria",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Seguros-Seguros" ), "Seguros-Seguros",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Telco-Media" ), "Telco",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Telco-Telco" ), "Telco",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Industria-Retail" ), "Industria-Retail",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Industria-Travel" ), "Industria-Travel",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Retail & Consu Goods" ), "Retail & Consu Goods",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Logistics & Transportation" ), "Logistics & Transportation",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Automotive & Mobility" ), "Automotive & Mobility",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Life Science" ), "Life Science",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Manufacturing" ), "Manufacturing",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Travel & Hospitality & Leisure" ), "Travel & Hospitality & Leisure",null )& IF ( INCLUDES ( Mercado__c, "Education & Services" ), "Education & Services",null )
CustomField.label: GSO Mercado
